judge_thought: Explanation: The "playoffs" column shows "did not qualify" in two rows: 1936/37 and 1938/39. All other entries are "no playoff", "champion (no playoff)", "1st round", "finals", or unknown. Therefore, the count of years with "did not qualify" is 2.
